'''Jangelle''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]]. A temperate world of sandy lowlands, it was crossed with many interlinking rivers, streams and deltas, although it had few large bodies of [[Water/Legends|water]].

The planet was settled by refugees fleeing the presence of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in the Kathol sector. It was a low-tech, but largely self-sufficient colony, requiring only a few supply runs a year to [[Gandle Ott]] or [[Pembric II]]. These mostly included replacement parts for the three orbital weather satellites, power generators and the few dozen [[Droid/Legends|droids]] on the planet.

Jangelle had a mutual defense pact with the [[Kathol Republic]], with the Republic's [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]] supplementing the colony's two capital ships. The colony was also defended by two [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]] positioned close to the settlement for orbital defense. Jangelle's isolation meant it was behind on important news and knew little about the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Word of the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor's]] death had reached them, but was presumed to be due to internal power struggles within the Empire, rather than the revolutionary movement. The colonists were also slow in receiving word of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]'s retreat.
